title: Object Offset (0x5A)
description: Object Offset triplet layout. Length and TID are not mapped here; payload starts at offset 2.

elements.name: ObjTpe
elements.description: Object type to be counted. Example values: 'A8' = Document, 'AF' = Page or paginated object.

elements.name: ObjOset
elements.description: Number of objects that precede the selected object in the document or print file (low-order 4 bytes, unsigned big-endian).

elements.name: ObjOstHi
elements.description: High-order bytes of the object count (unsigned big-endian). Optional; present when triplet length is 12.

notes: TID for this triplet is X'5A'. Length field (offset 0) and TID (offset 1) are intentionally not mapped per instructions.
